data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for preference learning affecting box contents.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding preference learning impacting box contents. However, the provided evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for preference learning, but there are no corresponding validations or confirmations that directly address this aspect.
gaps: No evidence of preference learning functionality being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
